LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS KARIN THURM, JANICE THURM, DAVID THURM'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED FROM SEP-09-2011 TO LAW AND MOTION AT SEP-13-2011, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR MOVING PARTY. (302)

DEFENDANTS KARIN THURM, ROSS MADDEN, JANICE THURM, DAVID THURM'S MOTION FOR CCP 425.16 SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) COMPLAINT. IS GRANTED. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FURTHER BRIEFING. DEFENDANT HAS MADE A PRIMA FACIE SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFFS' SUIT AROSE FROM AN ACT IN FURTHERANCE OF DEFENDANTS' RIGHT OF PETITION OR FREE SPEECH. PLAINTIFFS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THEIR CLAIMS WOULD SUCCEED ON THE MERITS. DEFENDANTS ARE AWARDED COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,517.50. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797 (302)

DEFENDANT ROSS MCLAURAN MADDEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF WEST GROUP REAL ESTATE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, JOHN MONTGOMERY, MITCHELL R. PETERS, LINDA V. KOCEK PETERS, RICHARD PETERS, MADELINE PETERS, DANIEL B. PETERS, ELIZABETH HOWARD PETERS.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR, MATTER HEARD ON SEPTEMBER 13. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS KARIN THURM, ROSS MADDEN, JANICE THURM, DAVID THURM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Ross Madden (567.1212) defendant appearing in propria persona also representing other moving defendants; John Montgomery (609.4595) for plaintiffs and responding parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar as moot in view of the court's ruling on special motion to strike. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS KARIN THURM, ROSS MADDEN, JANICE THURM, DAVID THURM'S MOTION FOR CCP 425.16 SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Ross Madden (567.1212) defendant appearing in propria persona also representing other moving defendants; John Montgomery (609.4595) for plaintiffs and responding parties.
Argued. The court denied plaintiff's request for a continuance to allow further briefing. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Defendant has made a prima facie showing that plaintiffs' suit arose from an act in furtherance of defendants' right of petition or free speech. Plaintiffs fail to demonstrate that their claims would succeed on the merits. Defendants are awarded costs and attorney fees in the amount of $7,517.50. Order and Judgment signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
